_redaction_notice.rationale: Thread tokens and token-bearing URLs are redacted. Transcript rows, runtime heartbeats, and validator output are retained so the failure is independently reviewable without live relay credentials.

observed_issue: Host bridge started and wrote a starting heartbeat, but the opening OpenClaw call timed out after 90s. Guest bridge started and stopped after manual cleanup close.
coverage_note: Hosted gated relay post-quota smoke attempt. It proves production create-key admission, Telegram self-launch to both runtimes, bridge heartbeats, and cleanup mutual close. It does not prove negotiation because the host bridge failed before posting an opening message.
